Localization.Description: User modify system configure file or changes in system configuration directory on host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Unsuccessful attempt to make changes in the directory of a system configuration "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
There were changes in the system configuration directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
Unsuccessful attempt to change system configuration file "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
The system configuration file {object.path} was changed on host {event_src.host}
